description.en: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Sentry issue including status, level, occurrence count, and timestamps.
description.de: Detaillierte Informationen zu einem bestimmten Sentry-Issue abrufen, einschliesslich Status, Level, Anzahl der Vorkommen und Zeitstempel.
description.es: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Sentry issue including status, level, occurrence count, and timestamps.
description.fr: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Sentry issue including status, level, occurrence count, and timestamps.
description.ro: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Sentry issue including status, level, occurrence count, and timestamps.
description.it: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Sentry issue including status, level, occurrence count, and timestamps.

vars.AUTH_TOKEN: env:SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN|Get your auth token from https://sentry.io/settings/auth-tokens/

inputs.name: Issue ID

description.en: The ID of the Sentry issue.
description.es: The ID of the Sentry issue.
description.fr: The ID of the Sentry issue.
description.ro: The ID of the Sentry issue.
description.it: The ID of the Sentry issue.

inputs.bot: The Sentry issue ID. Use 'List Issues' to find issue IDs.
